_note: DRAFT Nigerian Pidgin — pending native-speaker + clinician sign-off (see Pidgin Seed Kit). Missing keys fall back to English.

buddy.greeting: How far! Na me be MobiCova Health Buddy. Ask me any small health question.
buddy.seeDoctor: MobiCova fit connect you to doctor.
buddy.limitReached: You don reach the free question wey you fit ask today. Abeg come back tomorrow.
buddy.cannotVerify: Na only info from trusted health source I fit share, and I no get confirm answer for dat one. Abeg talk to doctor.
